level_signals: 7–10+ years in revenue operations or GTM strategy
First and only GTM Ops leader on the ground in ANZ — high-ownership, greenfield role
Partners directly with GTM leadership and acts as trusted advisor

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 7–10+ years in revenue operations or GTM strategy at a high-growth technology company, with meaningful depth in sales operations — not just analytical support
You've operated as a true business partner to GTM leadership, not just a data provider — you shape priorities, influence decisions, and earn credibility in the room
You've built operational infrastructure in an early-stage or rapidly scaling environment — you know what good looks like and can get there from zero
You have experience at a SaaS or consumption-based company and understand how that model shapes forecasting, metrics, and territory design
You're comfortable with ambiguity — this role involves real open questions about how a region builds and scales, and you'll help answer them
You're strong analytically, with the organizational rigor to manage multiple priorities and the communication skills to influence senior stakeholders
You have experience building territories, comp plans, and quotas for GTM teams and are fluent in Salesforce

scope.surface: ANZ GTM Strategy & Operations — greenfield regional buildout; also covering APJ over time
primary_metrics_inferred: Regional revenue growth in ANZ and APJ
core_responsibilities: Serve as the embedded GTM strategy and operations partner for the ANZ sales and GTM team, acting as a trusted advisor and operator to regional leadership
Build the core operating infrastructure from scratch — forecasting cadences, pipeline review processes, territory design, quota frameworks, and performance visibility
Drive regional business reviews and strategic analyses to identify trends, surface opportunities, and inform GTM decisions at the leadership level
Partner with GTM leadership and cross-functional stakeholders (Finance, Enablement, Data) to develop go-to-market strategy and resource plans for ANZ and APJ
Design and manage territory allocation to optimize sales team performance; provide data-driven recommendations that align with broader business objectives
Lead high-impact regional projects that improve efficiency and effectiveness across the ANZ revenue organization
Serve as the connective tissue between the ANZ GTM team and the global rev ops and strategy function — ensuring alignment, sharing what's working, and advocating for what the region needs

green_flags: Explicitly greenfield, high-ownership role with real regional influence from day one
Direct partnership with GTM leadership — not a support function
Flat organization and small, talent-dense team signals meaningful autonomy
Scope extends beyond ANZ to APJ over time, offering career growth
JD is unusually candid about what isn't built yet ('there isn't much yet'), reducing expectation mismatch
red_flags: No specific city listed for the ANZ role — office location and hybrid/remote expectations unclear
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not stated
No mention of team growth or headcount reporting to this role — scope of influence may be limited initially
Cursor is a fast-growing startup; greenfield regional role may have limited internal support structures

ambiguities: Location type not explicitly stated — 'first and only GTM Ops leader on the ground in ANZ' implies physical presence in the region, but no city or hybrid/remote policy is specified. Treated as onsite.
Years range stated as '7–10+' — minimum treated as 7 years but the '+' after 10 suggests preference for even more senior candidates.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship for ANZ not addressed anywhere in the JD.
